github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: This is a Flutter/Dart project following Clean Architecture. Domain layer is pure Dart. Use Riverpod for state. Drift for DB. Dio with IOHttpClientAdapter for HTTP. Java 21. No // ignore: pragmas. No TODO/FIXME in lib/. Explicit loop variable types required. Notifier methods use descriptive verbs (not 'set').

github.copilot.chat.testGeneration.instr.text: Use flutter_test. Domain tests are pure Dart — no Flutter deps. Use group()/test(). Cover happy path, edge cases, and boundaries. Domain coverage must be 100%. No // ignore: pragmas. Fixture helpers use camelCase, no leading underscores. Test names follow: '<behavior> when <condition>'.

github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Use Conventional Commits format: type(scope): description. Types: feat, fix, refactor, test, ci, chore, docs. Keep subject under 72 chars. No period at end. Add [skip ci] suffix only for version-bump commits.
